name: West Seattle High-Rise Bridge Replacement
address: SW Spokane St & Harbor Ave SW
description: Replacement of the West Seattle High-Rise Bridge spanning the Duwamish Waterway. New 1800-ft cable-stayed bridge with 205-ft main span clearance for Duwamish marine traffic. Includes approach structures on east and west landings
column18: and full LED lighting. SDOT-funded with FHWA participation.

name: SR-520 Montlake Lid & Lid Park
description: Concrete lid structure over SR-520 at Montlake Blvd reconnecting the Montlake neighborhood. 620-ft lid with 2.4-acre park on top including planted areas
column18: and viewpoints. Includes Montlake Flap Bridge replacement and bicycle/pedestrian bridge over SR-520.

name: Ballard Bridge Seismic Retrofit
description: Seismic retrofit of the 1917 Ballard Bascule Bridge. Installation of base isolation system at pier foundations
completion_pct: new seismic restrainers at moveable span
column19: and replacement of deteriorated timber fender system with steel pipe piles. Work performed under traffic.

name: Magnolia Bridge Feasibility & Early Works
description: Early construction works for Magnolia Bridge replacement including temporary shoring of existing structure
column19: and construction staging area preparation. Advance work enabling future full replacement contract.

name: Everett I-5 Interchange Ramp Reconstruction
description: Reconstruction of I-5 southbound off-ramp and loop ramp at SR-526 Everett. Full replacement of deteriorated ramp structure including new precast concrete girders
column19: and full ADA upgrade of associated pedestrian facilities.
